note: Default Graphite BackendSemaphore value wrapper is now exposed as Graphite_BackendSemaphore_new
Metal Graphite BackendSemaphore constructor is now exposed as Graphite_BackendSemaphore_newMtl with unavailable backends returning NULL
Graphite BackendSemaphore copy constructor is now exposed as Graphite_BackendSemaphore_newCopy
Graphite BackendSemaphore validity query is now exposed
Graphite BackendSemaphore backend query is now exposed
Graphite BackendSemaphore Metal event query is now exposed with NULL for unavailable Metal paths
Graphite BackendSemaphore Metal value query is now exposed with 0 for unavailable Metal paths
Graphite TextureInfo compatibility query is now exposed
Graphite ContextOptions default construction and stable budget field are now exposed
Graphite RecorderOptions default construction and stable budget field are now exposed
Graphite RecorderOptions copy construction is now exposed
